query:
CREATE TABLE `alertRules` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`description` text,
	`triggerType` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`condition` text NOT NULL,
	`notificationMethod` enum('email','in_app','both') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'both',
	`isActive` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `alertRules_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `alerts` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int,
	`alertType` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`message` text,
	`severity` enum('info','warning','error','critical') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'info',
	`status` enum('unread','read','archived') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'unread',
	`relatedModule` varchar(100),
	`relatedId` int,
	`actionUrl` varchar(500),
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`readAt` timestamp,
	CONSTRAINT `alerts_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `analyticsData` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`dataType` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`module` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`metric` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`value` decimal(20,2),
	`metadata` json,
	`recordDate` timestamp NOT NULL,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `analyticsData_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `anomalies` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`anomalyType` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`module` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`description` text,
	`severity` enum('low','medium','high','critical') NOT NULL,
	`status` enum('detected','acknowledged','resolved') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'detected',
	`relatedData` json,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`resolvedAt` timestamp,
	CONSTRAINT `anomalies_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `attendance` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`employeeId` int NOT NULL,
	`date` date NOT NULL,
	`checkInTime` time,
	`checkOutTime` time,
	`status` enum('present','absent','late','half_day','work_from_home') NOT NULL,
	`notes` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `attendance_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `auditLog` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`action` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`module` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`entityType` varchar(100),
	`entityId` int,
	`changes` json,
	`ipAddress` varchar(45),
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `auditLog_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `budgets` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`department` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`category` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`allocatedAmount` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL,
	`spentAmount` decimal(15,2) DEFAULT '0',
	`year` int NOT NULL,
	`month` int,
	`status` enum('active','archived') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `budgets_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `customers` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`email` varchar(320) NOT NULL,
	`phone` varchar(20),
	`company` varchar(255),
	`address` text,
	`city` varchar(100),
	`country` varchar(100),
	`industry` varchar(100),
	`customerType` enum('prospect','customer','vip','inactive') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'prospect',
	`creditLimit` decimal(15,2),
	`totalPurchases` decimal(15,2) DEFAULT '0',
	`lastInteraction` timestamp,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `customers_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `customers_email_unique` UNIQUE(`email`)
);
CREATE TABLE `documents` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`type` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`category` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`fileKey` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
	`fileUrl` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
	`fileSize` int,
	`mimeType` varchar(100),
	`relatedModule` varchar(100),
	`relatedId` int,
	`version` int DEFAULT 1,
	`uploadedBy` int NOT NULL,
	`isActive` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `documents_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `employees` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`employeeId` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
	`firstName` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`lastName` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`email` varchar(320) NOT NULL,
	`phone` varchar(20),
	`dateOfBirth` date,
	`joinDate` date NOT NULL,
	`department` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`position` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`salary` decimal(15,2),
	`status` enum('active','inactive','on_leave','terminated') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
	`manager` int,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `employees_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `employees_userId_unique` UNIQUE(`userId`),
	CONSTRAINT `employees_employeeId_unique` UNIQUE(`employeeId`),
	CONSTRAINT `employees_email_unique` UNIQUE(`email`)
);
CREATE TABLE `expenses` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`description` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`category` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`amount` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL,
	`status` enum('pending','approved','rejected','reimbursed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
	`expenseDate` date NOT NULL,
	`submittedBy` int NOT NULL,
	`approvedBy` int,
	`notes` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `expenses_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `interactions` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`customerId` int,
	`leadId` int,
	`type` enum('call','email','meeting','note','task') NOT NULL,
	`subject` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`description` text,
	`createdBy` int NOT NULL,
	`interactionDate` timestamp NOT NULL,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `interactions_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `inventory` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`productId` int NOT NULL,
	`warehouseId` int NOT NULL,
	`quantity` int NOT NULL,
	`lastStockCheck` timestamp,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `inventory_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `invoices` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`invoiceNumber` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
	`customerId` int,
	`vendorId` int,
	`amount` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL,
	`tax` decimal(15,2) DEFAULT '0',
	`totalAmount` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL,
	`status` enum('draft','sent','paid','overdue','cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
	`issueDate` date NOT NULL,
	`dueDate` date NOT NULL,
	`description` text,
	`notes` text,
	`createdBy` int NOT NULL,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `invoices_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `invoices_invoiceNumber_unique` UNIQUE(`invoiceNumber`)
);
CREATE TABLE `leads` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`email` varchar(320),
	`phone` varchar(20),
	`company` varchar(255),
	`source` varchar(100),
	`status` enum('new','contacted','qualified','proposal','won','lost') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'new',
	`score` int DEFAULT 0,
	`assignedTo` int,
	`expectedValue` decimal(15,2),
	`closingDate` date,
	`notes` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `leads_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `leaves` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`employeeId` int NOT NULL,
	`leaveType` enum('annual','sick','maternity','paternity','unpaid','other') NOT NULL,
	`startDate` date NOT NULL,
	`endDate` date NOT NULL,
	`reason` text,
	`status` enum('pending','approved','rejected','cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
	`approvedBy` int,
	`approvalDate` timestamp,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `leaves_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `milestones` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`projectId` int NOT NULL,
	`name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`description` text,
	`dueDate` date NOT NULL,
	`status` enum('pending','completed','at_risk') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
	`deliverables` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `milestones_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `payroll` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`employeeId` int NOT NULL,
	`month` int NOT NULL,
	`year` int NOT NULL,
	`baseSalary` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL,
	`allowances` decimal(15,2) DEFAULT '0',
	`deductions` decimal(15,2) DEFAULT '0',
	`netSalary` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL,
	`status` enum('draft','processed','paid') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
	`processedAt` timestamp,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `payroll_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `poItems` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`poId` int NOT NULL,
	`productId` int NOT NULL,
	`quantity` int NOT NULL,
	`unitPrice` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL,
	`totalPrice` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL,
	`receivedQuantity` int DEFAULT 0,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `poItems_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `predictions` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`predictionType` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`module` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`targetValue` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`predictedValue` text,
	`confidence` decimal(5,2),
	`status` enum('active','archived') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `predictions_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `products` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`sku` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`description` text,
	`category` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`unitPrice` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL,
	`quantity` int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
	`reorderPoint` int NOT NULL,
	`reorderQuantity` int NOT NULL,
	`warehouseLocation` varchar(100),
	`supplier` int,
	`status` enum('active','inactive','discontinued') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `products_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `products_sku_unique` UNIQUE(`sku`)
);
CREATE TABLE `projects` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`description` text,
	`status` enum('planning','active','on_hold','completed','cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'planning',
	`startDate` date NOT NULL,
	`endDate` date NOT NULL,
	`budget` decimal(15,2),
	`spent` decimal(15,2) DEFAULT '0',
	`manager` int NOT NULL,
	`priority` enum('low','medium','high','critical') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'medium',
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `projects_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `purchaseOrders` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`poNumber` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
	`supplierId` int NOT NULL,
	`status` enum('draft','pending','approved','received','cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
	`orderDate` date NOT NULL,
	`expectedDeliveryDate` date,
	`totalAmount` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL,
	`createdBy` int NOT NULL,
	`approvedBy` int,
	`notes` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `purchaseOrders_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `purchaseOrders_poNumber_unique` UNIQUE(`poNumber`)
);
CREATE TABLE `reportExecutions` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`reportId` int NOT NULL,
	`executedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`data` json,
	`exportFormat` varchar(50),
	`fileKey` varchar(500),
	`fileUrl` varchar(500),
	`status` enum('pending','completed','failed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
	CONSTRAINT `reportExecutions_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `reports` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`type` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`module` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`description` text,
	`query` text,
	`schedule` varchar(100),
	`lastGenerated` timestamp,
	`nextGeneration` timestamp,
	`isActive` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
	`createdBy` int NOT NULL,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `reports_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `stockMovements` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`productId` int NOT NULL,
	`movementType` enum('in','out','adjustment','return') NOT NULL,
	`quantity` int NOT NULL,
	`reference` varchar(100),
	`notes` text,
	`createdBy` int NOT NULL,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `stockMovements_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `suppliers` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`contactPerson` varchar(255),
	`email` varchar(320),
	`phone` varchar(20),
	`address` text,
	`city` varchar(100),
	`country` varchar(100),
	`paymentTerms` varchar(100),
	`rating` decimal(3,2),
	`status` enum('active','inactive') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `suppliers_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `tasks` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`projectId` int NOT NULL,
	`title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`description` text,
	`status` enum('todo','in_progress','review','completed','blocked') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'todo',
	`priority` enum('low','medium','high','critical') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'medium',
	`assignedTo` int,
	`dueDate` date,
	`estimatedHours` decimal(10,2),
	`actualHours` decimal(10,2),
	`progress` int DEFAULT 0,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `tasks_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `users` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`openId` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`name` text,
	`email` varchar(320),
	`phone` varchar(20),
	`department` varchar(100),
	`role` enum('admin','manager','employee','system_admin') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'employee',
	`loginMethod` varchar(64),
	`isActive` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	`lastSignedIn` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `users_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `users_openId_unique` UNIQUE(`openId`),
	CONSTRAINT `users_email_unique` UNIQUE(`email`)
);

CREATE TABLE `anomalies` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`anomalyType` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`module` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`description` text,
	`severity` enum('low','medium','high','critical') NOT NULL,
	`status` enum('detected','acknowledged','resolved') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'detected',
	`relatedData` json,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`resolvedAt` timestamp,
	CONSTRAINT `anomalies_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)

CREATE TABLE `attendance` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`employeeId` int NOT NULL,
	`date` date NOT NULL,
	`checkInTime` time,
	`checkOutTime` time,
	`status` enum('present','absent','late','half_day','work_from_home') NOT NULL,
	`notes` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `attendance_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `auditLog` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`action` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`module` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`entityType` varchar(100),
	`entityId` int,
	`changes` json,

	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),

CREATE TABLE `budgets` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`department` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`category` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`allocatedAmount` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL,
	`spentAmount` decimal(15,2) DEFAULT '0',

	`month` int,
	`status` enum('active','archived') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',

CREATE TABLE `customers` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`email` varchar(320) NOT NULL,
	`phone` varchar(20),
	`company` varchar(255),
	`address` text,
	`city` varchar(100),
	`country` varchar(100),
	`industry` varchar(100),
	`customerType` enum('prospect','customer','vip','inactive') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'prospect',
	`creditLimit` decimal(15,2),
	`totalPurchases` decimal(15,2) DEFAULT '0',
	`lastInteraction` timestamp,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `customers_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `customers_email_unique` UNIQUE(`email`)
);
CREATE TABLE `documents` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`type` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`category` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`fileKey` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
	`fileUrl` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
	`fileSize` int,
	`mimeType` varchar(100),
	`relatedModule` varchar(100),
	`relatedId` int,
	`version` int DEFAULT 1,
	`uploadedBy` int NOT NULL,
	`isActive` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `documents_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `employees` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`employeeId` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
	`firstName` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`lastName` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`email` varchar(320) NOT NULL,
	`phone` varchar(20),
	`dateOfBirth` date,
	`joinDate` date NOT NULL,
	`department` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`position` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`salary` decimal(15,2),
	`status` enum('active','inactive','on_leave','terminated') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
	`manager` int,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `employees_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `employees_userId_unique` UNIQUE(`userId`),
	CONSTRAINT `employees_employeeId_unique` UNIQUE(`employeeId`),
	CONSTRAINT `employees_email_unique` UNIQUE(`email`)
);
CREATE TABLE `expenses` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`description` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`category` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`amount` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL,
	`status` enum('pending','approved','rejected','reimbursed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
	`expenseDate` date NOT NULL,
	`submittedBy` int NOT NULL,
	`approvedBy` int,
	`notes` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `expenses_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `interactions` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`customerId` int,
	`leadId` int,
	`type` enum('call','email','meeting','note','task') NOT NULL,
	`subject` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`description` text,
	`createdBy` int NOT NULL,
	`interactionDate` timestamp NOT NULL,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `interactions_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `inventory` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`productId` int NOT NULL,
	`warehouseId` int NOT NULL,
	`quantity` int NOT NULL,
	`lastStockCheck` timestamp,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `inventory_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `invoices` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`invoiceNumber` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
	`customerId` int,
	`vendorId` int,
	`amount` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL,
	`tax` decimal(15,2) DEFAULT '0',
	`totalAmount` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL,
	`status` enum('draft','sent','paid','overdue','cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
	`issueDate` date NOT NULL,
	`dueDate` date NOT NULL,
	`description` text,
	`notes` text,
	`createdBy` int NOT NULL,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `invoices_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `invoices_invoiceNumber_unique` UNIQUE(`invoiceNumber`)
);
CREATE TABLE `leads` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`email` varchar(320),
	`phone` varchar(20),

	`status` enum('new','contacted','qualified','proposal','won','lost') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'new',
	`score` int DEFAULT 0,

	`expectedValue` decimal(15,2),
	`closingDate` date,
	`notes` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),

	CONSTRAINT `leads_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `leaves` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,

	`status` enum('pending','approved','rejected','cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
	`approvedBy` int,

	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `leaves_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `milestones` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`projectId` int NOT NULL,

	`status` enum('pending','completed','at_risk') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',

CREATE TABLE `payroll` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`employeeId` int NOT NULL,
	`month` int NOT NULL,
	`year` int NOT NULL,
	`baseSalary` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL,
	`allowances` decimal(15,2) DEFAULT '0',
	`deductions` decimal(15,2) DEFAULT '0',
	`netSalary` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL,
	`status` enum('draft','processed','paid') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
	`processedAt` timestamp,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `payroll_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `poItems` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,

);
CREATE TABLE `predictions` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,

);
CREATE TABLE `products` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,

CREATE TABLE `projects` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
